en: There's a quiet in the way you say my name
zh: 你叫我的名字時帶著一種安靜，
ja: あなたが私の名前を呼ぶときの静けさは、

en: like it's fragile like a spark inside of the flame

en: I was walking through the echoes of my past, counting moments that I thought would never last

en: Then you found me in the middle of the great

en: turn the night into a soft

en: and golden day
ja: らかく黄金色の日に変えた

en: I was drifting like a melody off key
